news.title: AI Doesn't Need Endless Training Data to Act More Like Human Brain
news.snippet: New research shows that AI doesn't need endless training data to start acting more like a human brain. When researchers redesigned AI systems to better resemble biological brains, some models showed improved performance.

tech.title: Google Launches New AI Professional Certificate
tech.snippet: Google is giving small businesses free access. The course teaches practical AI skills and gives access to Google AI tools.
